name: Group member picker and refresh
type: Shared platform module / Portal SSO handoff

dataIsolation.guard: A member refresh resolves pageId only from the active tenant's group-binding data source and PATCHes through tenantKey isolation.

definitionOfDone: Groups page renders an owner dropdown and a multi-select reminder dropdown from that row's member map
Member refresh retrieves LINE group members and writes only the active tenant's binding page
Duplicate LINE display names remain distinguishable
Groups dry-run and node syntax checks pass
Portal project entry verifies its existing am-tenant permission before issuing a short-lived handoff
